occurrences: 'Academy' should be lower case unless specific name

'If a student has questions, he should'

'This is a really really...long sentence' at the end
'long flight from America' — should be 'from the US'
'Our phone services utilize real people' — 'utilize' should be 'use'
'DONT FORGET' — missing apostrophe, should be 'Don't forget'
Semicolons used in bullet point list items
'please use these details' — 'please' before a mandatory action
'home secretary' should be 'Home Secretary' when referring to specific role title
'bona vacantia' and 'escheatment protocols' - legal jargon without plain English explanation
'clicking here' - not specific or front-loaded with relevant terms
Mixed bullet and number formatting: '- Cambridge', '1 - Leeds', '3 - Manchester'
'1 : 3' should have no spaces around colon '1:3'
'£50m' should be '£50 million' - do not abbreviate million to m
'£0.5m' should be '£500,000' or '£0.5 million' in context
'Minister Joe' - should not use shortened title with name
'Minister Joe works hard' - do not use shortened ministerial title with just first name
'.75' should be '0.75' - use 0 where there's no digit before decimal point
'The ministry for defence are' should use singular verb 'is'
'the ministry of defence have' should use singular verb 'has'
'click the button to load the next window' and 'home view of the app' - use 'page' instead of 'screen'
'Plain english' should be 'plain English' - lower case 'plain', upper case 'English'
Multiple paragraphs of speech - check quote marks open at each new paragraph but close only at end
Very long legal sentence: 'The party of the first part shall, notwithstanding...' far exceeds recommended length
'said the Director' — should be lowercase 'director' when not preceding a name
'Geography' should be lower case 'geography' unless part of qualification name
'Clostridium Difficile' should be 'Clostridium difficile' - only first part capitalized
'Armed Forces Services' - in military contexts 'services' should be lower case
Summary exceeds 160 characters and contains redundant information - not clear and specific
Technical jargon without explanation: 'API', 'JSON payload', 'idempotency key', 'TLS handshake', 'SQL shards'
'447976123456' - lacks proper formatting with spaces and prefix label (Telephone: or Mobile phone:)
'How can I find out more information / details about the C.S.S. scheme - a guide' - contains slash and dash which violate title rules
